results.title: World Cup Final Week: Rivalries, Records and Glory Await
results.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 has reached its dramatic climax, with England and Argentina preparing for a blockbuster semi-final showdown as football’s biggest stars chase history. From Lionel Messi’s Golden Boot battle to Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham’s World Cup dreams, the final week promises unforgettable moments, legendary performances and a spectacular celebration of the beautiful game.

results.title: Blyth quintet seal qualification for JDC World Youth Darts Championship in Gibraltar
results.description: Blyth’s Darts Academy North East will be well-represented at the JDC World Youth Darts Championship later this year.

results.title: Foot (F) : l’internationale française Melvine Malard quitte Manchester United pour Chelsea
results.description: Après deux saisons, l’attaquante internationale française Melvine Malard va quitter Manchester United mais reste en Angleterre et va rejoindre Chelsea.

results.title: Ghana risks losing U-20 AFCON hosting rights without stadium upgrades — Kofi Adams
results.description: The Minister of Sports and Recreation, Kofi Adams, has warned that Ghana could lose the opportunity to host next year’s U-20 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) if urgent improvements are not made to the country’s sporting facilities. Ghana secured the hosting rights for the youth continental tournament as part of activities marking the country’s 70th [...]

results.title: England Recall Brydon Carse for India ODI Series as Pace All-Rounder Returns from Injury
results.description: England have added a crucial member to their current three-match ODI series against India by recalling pace bowling all-rounder Brydon Carse to the squad after his recovery from wrist and elbow injuries. The 30-year-old has been forced to spend several months out of the game, but the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) is confident that the right-arm bowler will contribute significantly to the team, as he made three appearances during the Vitality Blast for Durham County. This will provide Eng...
